title: ageratina soejimana
intro: Ageratina soejimana, also known as Mexican mint or Hierba de Limon, is a type of flowering plant native to Mexico, belonging to the mint family Lamiaceae. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antispasmodic properties. Ageratina soejimana has been found to have various health benefits, such as reducing stress, improving digestion, and alleviating symptoms of colds and flu. The plant can be prepared into various herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
